info.name: Microsoft Entra Microsoft Graph Identity API

params.name: $select
params.description: Comma-separated list of properties to include in the response. If unspecified, a default set of properties is returned.

params.name: $filter
params.description: OData filter expression to restrict the returned collection

params.name: $orderby
params.description: Comma-separated list of properties to sort results by

params.name: $top
params.description: Maximum number of items to return in the response

params.name: $skip
params.description: Number of items to skip in the result set

params.name: $count
params.description: Include a count of the total number of items in the collection. Requires ConsistencyLevel header set to eventual.

params.name: $search
params.description: Search string to filter results using tokenized search across displayName and description properties. Requires ConsistencyLevel header set to eventual.

params.name: $expand
params.description: Comma-separated list of relationships to expand and include

items.docs: Retrieve a list of user objects in the directory. Returns a paged collection of user resources with support for OData query parameters including $select, $filter, $orderby, $top, $skip, $count, $search, and $expand.
Create a new user in the directory. The request body must contain the required properties including displayName, accountEnabled, mailNickname, userPrincipalName, and passwordProfile.

params.name: user-id
params.description: Unique identifier of the user (object ID) or the userPrincipalName (e.g., user@contoso.com)

params.name: $select
params.description: Comma-separated list of properties to include in the response. If unspecified, a default set of properties is returned.

params.name: $expand
params.description: Comma-separated list of relationships to expand and include

items.docs: Retrieve the properties and relationships of a user object. Specify the user by id or userPrincipalName.

params.name: user-id
params.description: Unique identifier of the user (object ID) or the userPrincipalName (e.g., user@contoso.com)

items.docs: Update the properties of a user object. Not all properties can be updated by member or guest users with their default permissions without administrator roles.

params.name: user-id
params.description: Unique identifier of the user (object ID) or the userPrincipalName (e.g., user@contoso.com)

items.docs: Delete a user object. The user is moved to the deletedItems container and can be restored within 30 days. After 30 days the user is permanently deleted.

info.name: Microsoft Entra List User Group Memberships

params.name: user-id
params.description: Unique identifier of the user (object ID) or the userPrincipalName (e.g., user@contoso.com)

params.name: $select
params.description: Comma-separated list of properties to include in the response. If unspecified, a default set of properties is returned.

params.name: $filter
params.description: OData filter expression to restrict the returned collection

params.name: $top
params.description: Maximum number of items to return in the response

items.docs: Get the groups, directory roles, and administrative units that the user is a direct member of.

params.name: $select
params.description: Comma-separated list of properties to include in the response. If unspecified, a default set of properties is returned.

params.name: $filter
params.description: OData filter expression to restrict the returned collection

params.name: $orderby
params.description: Comma-separated list of properties to sort results by

params.name: $top
params.description: Maximum number of items to return in the response

params.name: $skip
params.description: Number of items to skip in the result set

params.name: $count
params.description: Include a count of the total number of items in the collection. Requires ConsistencyLevel header set to eventual.

params.name: $search
params.description: Search string to filter results using tokenized search across displayName and description properties. Requires ConsistencyLevel header set to eventual.

params.name: $expand
params.description: Comma-separated list of relationships to expand and include

items.docs: List all groups in the directory including Microsoft 365 groups, security groups, mail-enabled security groups, and distribution groups. Returns a paged collection with OData query support.

Create a new group in the directory. You can create Microsoft 365 groups, security groups, or mail-enabled security groups. Specify the groupTypes, mailEnabled, and securityEnabled properties to determine the type of group.

params.name: group-id
params.description: Unique identifier of the group (object ID)

params.name: $select
params.description: Comma-separated list of properties to include in the response. If unspecified, a default set of properties is returned.

params.name: $expand
params.description: Comma-separated list of relationships to expand and include

items.docs: Get the properties and relationships of a group object. Returns the default set of properties unless $select is specified.

params.name: group-id
params.description: Unique identifier of the group (object ID)

items.docs: Update the properties of a group object. Not all properties can be updated depending on the group type.

params.name: group-id
params.description: Unique identifier of the group (object ID)

items.docs: Delete a group. Deleting a Microsoft 365 group moves it to the deletedItems container where it can be restored within 30 days. Security groups are permanently deleted immediately.

params.name: group-id
params.description: Unique identifier of the group (object ID)

params.name: $select
params.description: Comma-separated list of properties to include in the response. If unspecified, a default set of properties is returned.

params.name: $filter
params.description: OData filter expression to restrict the returned collection

params.name: $top
params.description: Maximum number of items to return in the response

params.name: $count
params.description: Include a count of the total number of items in the collection. Requires ConsistencyLevel header set to eventual.

items.docs: Get the direct members of a group. A group can have users, devices, other groups, organizational contacts, and service principals as members.

params.name: group-id
params.description: Unique identifier of the group (object ID)

items.docs: Add a member to a Microsoft 365 group or a security group by posting a reference to the directory object to add.

params.name: group-id
params.description: Unique identifier of the group (object ID)

params.name: directoryObject-id
params.description: Unique identifier of the directory object to remove

items.docs: Remove a member from a group via the members navigation property. Specify the member to remove by its directory object id.

params.name: $select
params.description: Comma-separated list of properties to include in the response. If unspecified, a default set of properties is returned.

params.name: $filter
params.description: OData filter expression to restrict the returned collection

params.name: $orderby
params.description: Comma-separated list of properties to sort results by

params.name: $top
params.description: Maximum number of items to return in the response

params.name: $skip
params.description: Number of items to skip in the result set

params.name: $count
params.description: Include a count of the total number of items in the collection. Requires ConsistencyLevel header set to eventual.

params.name: $search
params.description: Search string to filter results using tokenized search across displayName and description properties. Requires ConsistencyLevel header set to eventual.

items.docs: Get the list of application registrations in the directory. Returns the application objects with their configuration properties including credentials, permissions, and sign-in settings.
Create a new application registration in the directory. The application object represents the global definition of the app including its identity, access configuration, and settings.

params.name: application-id
params.description: Unique identifier of the application (object ID, not appId)

params.name: $select
params.description: Comma-separated list of properties to include in the response. If unspecified, a default set of properties is returned.

params.name: $expand
params.description: Comma-separated list of relationships to expand and include

items.docs: Get the properties and relationships of an application object by its id (object id, not appId).

params.name: application-id
params.description: Unique identifier of the application (object ID, not appId)

items.docs: Update the properties of an application object.

params.name: application-id
params.description: Unique identifier of the application (object ID, not appId)

items.docs: Delete an application object. The application is moved to the deletedItems container and can be restored within 30 days.

params.name: application-id
params.description: Unique identifier of the application (object ID, not appId)

items.docs: Add a strong password or secret to an application. The response includes the generated secretText which is only returned at creation time and cannot be retrieved later.

params.name: application-id
params.description: Unique identifier of the application (object ID, not appId)

items.docs: Remove a password credential from an application by specifying the keyId of the password to remove.

params.name: $select
params.description: Comma-separated list of properties to include in the response. If unspecified, a default set of properties is returned.

params.name: $filter
params.description: OData filter expression to restrict the returned collection

params.name: $orderby
params.description: Comma-separated list of properties to sort results by

params.name: $top
params.description: Maximum number of items to return in the response

params.name: $skip
params.description: Number of items to skip in the result set

params.name: $count
params.description: Include a count of the total number of items in the collection. Requires ConsistencyLevel header set to eventual.

params.name: $search
params.description: Search string to filter results using tokenized search across displayName and description properties. Requires ConsistencyLevel header set to eventual.

items.docs: Retrieve a list of service principal objects in the directory. A service principal represents an instance of an application in a tenant and is the identity used for authentication and authorization.
Create a new service principal in the directory. The appId property in the request body is required and must reference an existing application registration.

params.name: servicePrincipal-id
params.description: Unique identifier of the service principal (object ID)

params.name: $select
params.description: Comma-separated list of properties to include in the response. If unspecified, a default set of properties is returned.

params.name: $expand
params.description: Comma-separated list of relationships to expand and include

items.docs: Retrieve the properties and relationships of a service principal object.

params.name: servicePrincipal-id
params.description: Unique identifier of the service principal (object ID)

items.docs: Update the properties of a service principal object.

params.name: servicePrincipal-id
params.description: Unique identifier of the service principal (object ID)

items.docs: Delete a service principal object. This removes the application instance from the tenant but does not delete the application registration.

info.name: Microsoft Entra List App Role Assignments

params.name: servicePrincipal-id
params.description: Unique identifier of the service principal (object ID)

params.name: $select
params.description: Comma-separated list of properties to include in the response. If unspecified, a default set of properties is returned.

params.name: $top
params.description: Maximum number of items to return in the response

items.docs: Get the app role assignments granted to this service principal. App role assignments represent permissions granted to the service principal to call another application's API.

info.name: Microsoft Entra Grant App Role Assignment

params.name: servicePrincipal-id
params.description: Unique identifier of the service principal (object ID)

items.docs: Grant an app role assignment to a service principal. App roles assigned to service principals are also known as application permissions.
